title: ICAI Announces Revised Code of Ethics (13th Edition) Applicability from April 1, 2026
content:
# ICAI Announces Revised Code of Ethics (13th Edition) Applicability from April 1, 2026

Ek important update hai for all Chartered Accountants! The Institute of Chartered Accountants of India (ICAI) ne Revised Code of Ethics (13th Edition) ki applicability date announce kar di hai.

Here's what you need to know:

*   **What's New:** The ICAI has announced the applicability of the Revised Code of Ethics (13th Edition), which comprises Volume I, Volume II, and Volume III.
*   **Effective Date:** This revised Code will be applicable from **April 1, 2026**.
*   **Specific Exception:** A particular provision related to "Assessment and evaluation of Social Impact, CSR Impact, Business Responsibility and Sustainability Reporting, and the like" under Management Consultancy and Other services (issued under Section 2(2)(iv) of the Chartered Accountants Act, 1949) is already effective from **December 11, 2025**.
*   **Purpose:** The updated Code aims to align with global practices, including the International Ethics Standards Board for Accountants (IESBA) Code of Ethics 2024 edition, and introduces new ethical standards for sustainability assurance. This move also brings changes to advertising guidelines for CA firms, offering more flexibility in promotion while maintaining ethical boundaries.
*   **Announcement Date:** This announcement was made by ICAI on May 30, 2026.

## Read the Official Document
*   [Download the Official Notification/Circular here](https://www.icai.org/post.html?post_id=14183)

*Published on: 1 June 2026*
